# Feature Specification Template

Use this template for every documentation-first feature specification.

## Feature ID

`PHR-[CATEGORY]-000`

Feature IDs are permanent and must not be changed after assignment.

## Title

[Clear descriptive feature name.]

## Status

[Proposed | Planned | In Progress | Completed | Deferred | Future]

## Priority

[Critical | High | Medium | Low]

## Category

[Backlog | PRD | Architecture | Technical | Database | API | UI | UX | Workflow | Business Rule | Testing | Roadmap | Release Notes | Future | Prompt]

## Objective

[Explain what this feature accomplishes.]

## Background

[Explain why this feature exists.]

## Problem Statement

[Describe the current limitation.]

## Proposed Solution

[Describe the complete solution.]

## Functional Requirements

- [Detailed behavior.]
- [Major workflow.]
- [Required interaction.]

## Non-Functional Requirements

### Performance

[Performance requirements.]

### Scalability

[Scalability requirements.]

### Maintainability

[Maintainability requirements.]

### Reliability

[Reliability requirements.]

### Accessibility

[Accessibility requirements.]

### Offline Support

[Offline behavior, if applicable.]

### Security

[Security requirements.]

### Extensibility

[Extension points.]

### Responsiveness

[Desktop, mobile, and interaction responsiveness.]

## User Stories

- As a [user], I want [capability], so that [outcome].

## Acceptance Criteria

- [Objective completion condition.]

## Edge Cases

- [Corner case.]
- [Failure scenario.]
- [Recovery behavior.]
- [Boundary condition.]

## Dependencies

- [Related feature.]
- [Related API.]
- [Database dependency.]
- [External service.]

## Future Enhancements

- [Natural extension.]

## Technical Notes

[Implementation guidance, architecture considerations, and potential abstractions.]

## UI / UX Notes

[Interaction recommendations, layout considerations, touch targets, mobile behavior, desktop behavior, and accessibility.]

## Success Metrics

- [Measurable outcome.]

## Open Questions

- [Unresolved decision.]

## Traceability

- Originating prompt or work order: [link or description].
- Related implementation prompt: [path].
- Related tests: [path].
- Related release notes: [path].
- Last modified: [date].
- Modification reason: [reason].
